mapper.sql: p.id, p.user_id, p.store_id, p.category_id, p.title, p.description, p.price_min, p.price_max, p.currency, p.location_text, p.status, p.moderation_reason, p.view_count, p.like_count, p.favorite_count, p.comment_count, p.published_at, p.deleted_at, p.created_at, p.updated_at, u.username AS author_username
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM posts p INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE p.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM posts p INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE p.status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY p.published_at DESC, p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC

SELECT
FROM posts p INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status != 'DELETED' ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PUBLISHED'

UPDATE posts SET store_id = #{storeId}, category_id = #{categoryId}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, price_min = #{priceMin}, price_max = #{priceMax}, currency = #{currency}, location_text = #{locationText} WHERE id = #{id} AND status != 'DELETED'
